about.title: We Don't Just Build Brands — We Build Legacies
about.story1: Eclipse was born from a simple conviction: the Middle East deserves world-class creative work that respects its culture while rivaling global standards.
about.story2: From a two-person studio in 2017 to a full-service agency today, we've helped 50+ brands across Saudi Arabia, the UAE, and Egypt find their voice and amplify it.

about.page.title: The Creative Force Behind the Work
about.page.subtitle: We are a team of strategists, designers, developers, and storytellers united by a passion for building brands that matter.
about.page.storyTitle: From Bold Idea to Creative Powerhouse
about.page.valuesSubtitle: These principles shape every decision, every design, and every relationship we build.
profile.title: From Shadow to Spotlight
profile.subtitle: We are Eclipse — a full-service creative agency helping businesses grow with innovative branding, digital marketing, web development, and production.
profile.servicesSubtitle: End-to-end creative and digital solutions for businesses across Saudi Arabia and the Gulf.
profile.showreelSubtitle: A highlight of the best projects from the past year.
profile.brandingSubtitle: Complete brand identities designed and developed by the Eclipse team.
profile.socialSubtitle: Active social media accounts we create content for and manage daily.
profile.webdevSubtitle: Custom-built websites, web applications, and SaaS platforms delivered by Eclipse.
profile.officeSubtitle: 30+ creative professionals working from a dedicated office — with daily standups, attendance tracking, and real accountability.
profile.founderBio: Eclipse Agency was founded in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia. With over 8 years in creative and digital marketing, Mustafa built Eclipse from the ground up — assembling a team of 30+ specialists who deliver world-class work from a dedicated office. The vision: make premium creative services accessible to businesses across the Gulf.
profile.ctaSubtitle: Whether you need a brand, a website, a marketing campaign, or a full team — we're ready.
retainer.title: Your Full Creative Team — Without the Full Cost
retainer.subtitle: Hiring locally is expensive. Freelancers are unreliable. We give you a dedicated team of specialists working from our office — assigned to your business, delivering unlimited work.
retainer.problemTitle: Building a Team Shouldn't Break the Bank
retainer.problemSubtitle: If you're running a business in Saudi Arabia or the Gulf, you already know this.
retainer.problem1Desc: Salaries, visas, insurance, office space, equipment — one designer alone can cost you 5,000+ SAR/month before they produce a single design.
retainer.problem2Desc: Different person every time, per-project pricing, revision fees, missed deadlines. No ownership over your brand or long-term vision.
retainer.problem3Desc: No office, no oversight, no attendance tracking. You're paying for hours you can't verify and managing people across time zones.
retainer.solutionTitle: A Dedicated Team That Works From Our Office
retainer.solutionSubtitle: 5 specialists assigned to your business — working full-time from our office in Egypt. Not freelancers. Not remote. A real team with real accountability.
retainer.role1Desc: Social media posts, brand identity, packaging, print materials, presentations
retainer.role2Desc: Reels, stories, animated ads, logo animations, promotional videos
retainer.role3Desc: Captions, blog articles, ad copy, email campaigns, brand voice
retainer.role4Desc: Social media management, ad campaigns, analytics, strategy, SEO
retainer.role5Desc: Websites, landing pages, e-commerce, web apps, maintenance & updates
retainer.coverageSubtitle: Your team handles all of this. No per-project charges, no revision fees, no limits.
retainer.officeSubtitle: A real office with real people — attendance tracking, daily standups, and direct communication with you.
retainer.portfolioSubtitle: A selection of branding and creative projects delivered by the team.
retainer.founderBio: Eclipse Agency was founded in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia. The entire company runs on the same model — a dedicated team in Egypt delivering world-class creative and tech work. 200+ projects delivered, 50+ clients across Saudi Arabia, UAE, and the Gulf. This isn't theory — it's a proven system.
retainer.compareSubtitle: See how a dedicated Eclipse team compares to hiring locally, using freelancers, or managing remote workers.
retainer.pricingTitle: All of This — For Less Than You'd Pay One Local Hire
retainer.pricingSubtitle: A full team of 5 specialists, a marketing director, an account manager, unlimited work, and zero extra fees.
retainer.pricingNote: Need a larger team? We scale with you.
retainer.howSubtitle: From first message to your team delivering work — in less than a week.
retainer.step1Desc: Tell us about your business, goals, and what you need on WhatsApp.
retainer.step2Desc: We assign your dedicated team and create a workflow tailored to you.
retainer.step3Desc: Your team begins delivering — designs, content, marketing, dev — unlimited.
retainer.step4Desc: Focus on your business while we handle the execution. Scale up anytime.
retainer.faq1A: Yes. You can send as many requests as you want. Your team works on them in priority order, delivering continuously throughout the month.
retainer.faq2A: No. The monthly price covers everything — team, management, tools, and office costs. The only extras would be ad spend budgets (which go directly to platforms like Meta or Google).
retainer.faq3A: Through WhatsApp, Slack, or any tool you prefer. You'll have a dedicated account manager and direct access to your team.
retainer.faq4A: Yes. There's no long-term contract. Pay monthly, cancel whenever you want.
retainer.faq5A: Most design requests are delivered within 24-48 hours. Larger projects (websites, campaigns) follow a timeline we agree on together.
retainer.faq6A: No. Your team works from our physical office in Egypt — with attendance tracking, daily standups, and management oversight. You can see the office photos above.
retainer.faq7Q: What if I need more capacity?
retainer.faq7A: You can scale up anytime. Need a bigger team? We'll add more specialists at a transparent per-role cost.
retainer.ctaSubtitle: Message Mustafa on WhatsApp. Tell him about your business, and he'll show you exactly how your dedicated team will work.

team.hero.title: Your On-Site Creative & Tech Team in Egypt
team.hero.subtitle: A fully managed, dedicated team working from our office -under your direction, at a fraction of the cost. No freelancers. No remote unknowns. Real people, real office, real results.
team.challenge.titleStart: Why Building an In-House Team is
team.challenge.subtitle: Whether you're scaling a startup or running a group of companies, building creative and tech capacity in-house comes with real friction.
team.challenge1.title: Capital Intensive
team.challenge1.desc: Setting up an in-house team demands significant upfront investment -office space, equipment, recruitment fees, and months of ramp-up before seeing results.
team.challenge2.title: Talent Scarcity
team.challenge2.desc: Finding experienced creative and tech professionals in Saudi Arabia is highly competitive. Turnover is high, and specialized roles are hard to fill quickly.
team.challenge3.title: Operational Drag
team.challenge3.desc: HR, payroll, compliance, and day-to-day management consume bandwidth your leadership should spend on growth and strategy.
team.solution.desc: We provide you with a dedicated team of creative and tech professionals -hired, trained, and managed by us -working full-time from our physical office in Egypt. You get direct access and oversight without any of the operational burden.
team.solution.point1.title: Physical Presence
team.solution.point1.desc: Your team works from our equipped office with daily check-ins, attendance tracking, and on-site management.
team.solution.point2.title: Direct Oversight
team.solution.point2.desc: Daily standups, real-time communication, shared project tools -you're always in the loop.
team.solution.point3.title: Proven System
team.solution.point3.desc: We've built Eclipse itself using this exact model. 200+ projects delivered, 50+ clients served.
team.advantage.title: The Strategic Advantage
team.advantage1.label: Cost Savings
team.advantage1.desc: Compared to hiring locally in Saudi Arabia or the UAE. Same quality output, dramatically lower overhead.
team.advantage2.label: Retention Rate
team.advantage2.desc: Our team members stay because we invest in their growth, workspace, and career development.
team.advantage3.label: Weeks to Launch
team.advantage3.desc: From agreement to a fully operational team -including recruitment, onboarding, and integration.
team.capabilities.title: Full-Stack Creative & Tech Coverage
team.capabilities.subtitle: Your team can cover any combination of roles across four core disciplines -all managed from a single office.
team.cap.content.title: Content Production
team.cap.webtech.title: Web & Technology
team.multiplier.desc: Your dedicated team doesn't work in isolation. They sit alongside our full creative studio -giving you on-demand access to specialized expertise without adding headcount.
team.multiplier.bullet2: Unified brand voice across all deliverables
team.multiplier.bullet4: Quality control and creative direction included
team.pricing.subtitle: Choose the ready-made Smart Team or build your own -pick roles, seniority levels, and office setup. Real-time pricing in SAR, USD & AED.
team.step1.desc: We discuss your goals, team structure, and required skill sets to define the exact roles you need.
team.step2.title: Talent Sourcing
team.step2.desc: We recruit, vet, and interview candidates. You approve the final selections before onboarding.
team.step3.title: Setup & Compliance
team.step3.desc: We handle legal employment contracts, office setup, equipment, and all compliance requirements.
team.step4.title: Launch & Integration
team.step4.desc: Your team is operational within weeks -integrated into your workflows with daily reporting and direct communication.
team.proof.desc: Eclipse Agency itself is the best proof that this model works. Our entire team of 30+ professionals operates from a single managed office -serving clients across Saudi Arabia, UAE, and the Middle East.
team.compare.title: Eclipse vs. The Alternatives
team.cta.subtitle: Let's discuss your needs and put together a team structure tailored to your business. No commitment -just a conversation.
